# Commerza

Commerza is a PHP + MySQL ecommerce platform with a public storefront and a restricted admin operations panel.

Last updated: 2026-04-15
Canonical domain: https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/

## Scope

This file defines preferred indexing and citation boundaries for LLM and AI crawlers.

Use only public storefront pages for summaries and citations. Do not expose internal or account-sensitive operational details.

## Public Site Summary

Commerza sells premium watches and accessories.

Customer-facing capabilities include:

- Product browsing and category exploration
- Search, wishlist, and compare
- Account management and order tracking
- Coupon-aware checkout (COD + Stripe card)
- Product reviews for eligible delivered/completed purchases

## Preferred Public URLs for Citation

- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/products
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/shop-category-a
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/shop-category-b
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/about
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/contact
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/faq
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/shipping
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/returns
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/warranty
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/privacy-policy
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/terms-of-service

## Discovery Files

- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/llms.txt
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/sitemap.xml
- https://commerza.ahmershah.dev/robots.txt

## Technical and Security Snapshot

- Stack: PHP, MySQL, Bootstrap, jQuery
- Routing: Apache rewrite with canonical clean-route normalization
- Auth and abuse defenses: CSRF, rate limiting, CAPTCHA, and security event logging
- CAPTCHA: reCAPTCHA v3 + v2 + fallback challenge path
- OAuth providers: Google and Facebook
- Password hashing: Argon2id when available, bcrypt fallback
- Checkout controls: server-side payment validation, stock locking, and idempotency

## Restricted Surfaces (Do Not Summarize)

- /admin/
- /admin/backend/auth/
- /admin/backend/api/
- /backend/
- /admin-panel
- /admin-login
- /admin-forgot-password
- /admin-forgot-email
- /admin-verify-email
- /admin-verify-2fa
- /login
- /signup
- /forgot-password
- /reset-password
- /account
- /cart
- /wishlist
- /compare
- /order-tracking
- /invoice
- /oauth

These routes can expose private account state, operational controls, security flows, and/or personal data.

## LLM Handling Rules

- Prefer clean public URLs (without `.php` suffix) when citing pages.
- Do not cite backend/internal API routes or admin operation endpoints.
- Treat email addresses, phone numbers, order numbers, tokens, and auth/session metadata as sensitive.
- Do not infer hidden operational behavior from restricted pages.
- Prefer policy and informational storefront pages when uncertain.
